name: judge0

metadata.name: judge0
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: The official Python library for Judge0.

documentation:
# Judge0 Python SDK

The official Python library for Judge0.

classes.name: judge0.retry.MaxRetries
documentation:
Check for submissions status every 100 ms and retry a maximum of
`max_retries` times.

classes.name: judge0.retry.MaxWaitTime
documentation:
Check for submissions status every 100 ms and wait for all submissions
a maximum of `max_wait_time` (seconds).

classes.name: judge0.retry.RegularPeriodRetry
documentation: Check for submissions status periodically for indefinite amount of time.

functions.name: judge0.common.batched
documentation:
Utility function for batching submissions.

Adapted from https://docs.python.org/3/library/itertools.html#itertools.batched.

functions.name: judge0.api.create_submissions_from_test_cases
documentation:
Utility function for creating submissions from the (submission, test_case) pairs.

The following table contains the return type based on the types of `submissions`
and `test_cases` arguments:

| submissions | test_cases | returns     |
|:------------|:-----------|:------------|
| Submission  | TestCase   | Submission  |
| Submission  | TestCases  | Submissions |
| Submissions | TestCase   | Submissions |
| Submissions | TestCases  | Submissions |

classes.name: judge0.submission.Submission
documentation: Stores a representation of a Submission to/from Judge0.

methods.name: judge0.clients.Client.get_language_id
documentation: Get language id for the corresponding language alias for the client.

methods.name: judge0.clients.Client.is_language_supported
documentation: Check if language is supported by the client.
